name: JH Educational Technology INC.
summary: JH Educational Technology INC., an investment holding company, provides higher and secondary education, and related management services in the People's Republic of China. It operates and controls three schools, including Zhejiang Changzheng Vocational & Technical College, a junior college offers approximately 38 majors across seven key subject categories; Jingyi Secondary School that provide noncompulsory private education for high school students; and Zhengzhou College of Economics and Business, an undergraduate college provides formal undergraduate education and junior college education. The company also offers technical and management consultancy, and training services. JH Educational Technology INC. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Yueqing, the People's Republic of China.
